title: Quarterly Newsletter
description:
Rather than sending a perfunctory weekly email to go unopened like all other boring newsletters, publish a quarterly zine with beautiful production value and in-depth features.

Open with a "Letter from the Editor" by the CEO. Feature a MIDAO client in each issue with a fawning interview like it's a glossy magazine. Showcase MIDAO's latest public service to the islands with a photo spread.

Finish with a hyperlinked roundup of all MIDAO content since the last issue. (Optional: offer print editions to current MIDAO clients.)

title: Taste Test
description:
Instead of a dry, dime-a-dozen podcast format, have guests on to discuss their work (and ours) over a cooking challenge. Each episode, a Marshall Islander will submit a traditional recipe, and our onscreen team will attempt to recreate it.

For best results, film in NYC (lots of industry guests at hand) and have someone from the Marshall Islands Permanent Mission judge the final result.

Performing an activity engages the audience's mirror neurons in a way that podcasts do not. This is also a nice way to involve the local community back home.

title: XOXO
description:
Scavenger hunt that can be held at any time and/or scale. Hide a Marshall Islands postcard with a message from MIDAO in a public area. The first person to find and post it to socials tagging MIDAO wins a lump crypto prize.

Drop a single postcard in a crypto hub every month, or lay out a 10-card scavenger hunt around a big conference. Super flexible activation!

Tagline: XOXO marks the spot

title: Island Questionnaire
description:
In the style of the Proust Questionnaire, pose a list of island-themed questions to a different figure in crypto every month. Fluffy stuff like "What 3 records would you want to be stranded with on an island?" or "Trunks or speedo?"

Format it as a beautiful one pager, post and tag. More engaging than the usual interview fare, as everyone naturally thinks about what their own answers would be and occasionally replies with commentary.

title: GG: Jekab Tournament
description:
Easy but entertaining side event around any crypto conference. Host a catered jekab tournament with an enticing crypto prize.

Can be produced at any scale, from simple to lavish. Go big by renting out a beautiful indoor space with a full spread, or keep it breezy by staging it in a public park with snack coolers.

title: Atoll Adventure
description:
Engage both viewers and the local Marshall Islands community by staging a competition show wherein one XOXO postcard has been hidden on each inhabited atoll, and 4 local teams compete to collect the most.

Alternatively, a competition show version of XOXO can be produced basically anywhere.
